overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at blue hour, featuring neon billboards, futuristic vehicles, and towering skyscrapers under an elevated highway. The footage is clearly from a high-quality video game engine, likely Cyberpunk 2077, with cinematic lighting and atmospheric wet pavement reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk sidewalk under elevated highway with neon advertising

events.description: red sports car with glowing accents drives past on the wet street
large concrete support pillar temporarily blocks the view
wet dream billboard exits frame as camera passes the advertising pillar

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past with illuminated underglow

entered.detail: vertical neon billboard with pink 'WET DREAM' text glowing against the dark sky
massive concrete structure overhead with thick support pillars lining the sidewalk
circular pillar with multiple digital screens showing animated advertisements
tall glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents against the blue hour sky
metal safety railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with the camera walking forward past a prominent pink neon 'WET DREAM' billboard. A red sports car passes on the wet street to the left, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The environment is characterized by concrete pillars, metal railings, and the glow of digital advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with curved digital advertising wall

events.description: large curved digital advertising wall becomes prominent on the right side
black sedan and purple sports car pass by in sequence on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the curved wall of animated digital billboards

entered.detail: curved wall surface covered with multiple large animated digital screens showing various advertisements
large cyan neon sign reading 'DTR @ DECKER TANAKA & ROGERS' with bright blue glow
concrete wall section with green and red graffiti tags including 'TIGER CLAW'

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the initial billboard area into a commercial corridor dominated by a curved wall of digital advertisements on the right. The large cyan 'DTR' billboard for Decker Tanaka & Rogers becomes visible in the distance, while graffiti tags appear on the right wall. Vehicles continue to pass on the left as the sidewalk stretches forward under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with dense neon signage

events.description: vehicle with flashing emergency lights passes by on the street
slight camera adjustment as approaching the crosswalk and intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection with increasing traffic density and neon signage

notable_agents.action: black sedan with illuminated taillights moving slowly in traffic

entered.detail: tall pole with speed limit sign showing '40' and traffic signal lights
marked pedestrian crossing and wider street intersection ahead with multiple lanes

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy intersection with the large DTR billboard now prominent on the right. The camera passes a traffic control pole with a speed limit sign and approaches a crosswalk. Traffic density increases with multiple vehicles visible, including a black sedan in the near lane. The elevated highway structure continues overhead while the futuristic city skyline shifts to the left as the camera moves forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked cyberpunk sidewalk that transitions from a neon-lit underpass into a bustling commercial intersection. It begins beneath an elevated highway, passing a glowing pink Wet Dream billboard as a red sports car glides across the reflective pavement. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a commercial corridor where the concrete pillars give way to a curved wall of digital advertisements and graffiti, leading toward a distant cyan DTR billboard. The environment then opens up into a busy intersection, passing a traffic control pole and a crosswalk while the density of futuristic vehicles increases. Finally, the camera moves toward the heart of the city, with the towering skyline shifting to the left under the persistent shadow of the overhead highway.
